Off Calendar Nov-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Dunn, Esq. 415-982-2100 of Dunn & Panagotacos LLP for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

Granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
